title: Tillbridge Solar Project: decision on application for development consent under the Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Tillbridge Solar Limited for the construction, operation (including maintenance), and decommissioning of ground-mounted solar photovoltaic (PV) arrays with a total capacity exceeding 50 megawatts.  Date of decision  14 October 2025  Company / location   Tillbridge Solar LimitedLondon   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  Over 50 MW.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
